policy: Per-unit single source of truth: kit-parse rollout status (kitParse.*), tuning provenance (tier/tuned/evidence — absorbed from data/hand-tuned.json 2026-07-16; tier definitions in docs/hand-tuned.md), unmodeled kit text (mirrored from the override), and board pass records (sim/real per recorded comp, >1 = HOT). AUTO fields regenerate via scripts/kit-status.ts --refresh; workflow/evidence fields are preserved. Board ratio convention: docs/CONVENTIONS.md "Ratio direction".

tiers.MEASURED: focus recording / frame-count / gauge-popup read set or confirmed the values
tiers.CALIBRATED: fitted number tuned against real fights (mechanism suspected, value is ours)
tiers.VALIDATED: total graded ~1.0 in a recorded comp (not focus-recorded)
tiers.MODEL_ONLY: parser/datamine only, never confirmed against a real fight = UNTUNED

reference_grade.definition: tuned=true AND final-total ratio within 0.97-1.03 on >=5 distinct teams (dedup by unit set; focus not required). Recompute with scripts/refgrade.ts when graded comps change.

Resurrect with 96% HP.

skill2: Removes Metal σ.
Activates if the skill user has cast Burst Skill before Full Burst ends. Affects self.
Metal σ: Burst Gauge filling speed ▲ 70.4% continuously.

caveats: skill2: FB self buffs (Attack Damage +21.12% / ATK +63.36%) keyed to her OWN burst cast — the Metal σ economy approximation. Exact when she is the sole Burst III; a multi-B3 team's true σ state machine (battle-start grant, remove-on-FB, re-grant-on-her-cast) is phase-shifted vs this encoding.
skill2: Metal σ burst-gauge +70.4% modeled permanent — overstated in multi-B3 rotations where she skips bursts (σ drops until her next burst).

skill2: Charge Time ▼0.18 sec ally support approximated as chargeSpeedPct 18 to all allies — magnitude is an unmeasured ⚑ (0.18s ÷ the target's basic charge time) and the 'longest basic Charge Time' single-target selection is not engine-expressible (inert on non-charge allies).
skill1: hitCount-10 team heal is an event-only synergy hook (Crown-style recovery consumers); it adds no damage alone.
cadence: pullsPerSec / reloadFrames 121 are unverified datamine (mandatory ⚑).

skill1: Activates when landing a Full Charge attack. Affects all allies.
Damage dealt to Shield ▲ 100.09% for 3 sec.
skill2: Gain Pierce for 5 sec.

caveats: skill2: trigger is KIT-SILENT — modeled as refresh-on-shot (near-permanent while firing); an unmeasured ⚑ estimate — if the real trigger is burst-gated this over-credits out-of-Full-Burst uptime
skill2: 'Gain Pierce for 5 sec' modeled as static hasPierce (no timed-pierce primitive); tied to the same ⚑ trigger estimate
skill1: 'Damage dealt to Shield ▲ 100.09%' unmodeled — the raid boss is partless and never shields
cadence: datamined charge/reload tuple + the SR 22-frame bolt-gap default are unmeasured ⚑ estimates (autofire would add ~15–20% shots)

volume.name: Volume

skill1: Affects self when killing an enemy.
ATK ▲ 12.6% for 5 sec.

caveats: skill1: the kill-gated ATK ▲ 12.6% is unmodeled — it can never trigger against the raid boss (the boss does not die mid-fight)

cadence: fire rate / reload are unmeasured estimates (engine SMG default 20 pulls/s shipped; the raw datamine says 24 pulls/s, and reload_start_ammo 119 hints at rolling reload) — verify on a focus video
skill2/burst: escalating tiers reach full value only from her 3rd Full Burst / 3rd burst cast, and every modeled effect is burst-gated — the whole kit is inert in a team that cannot chain Full Bursts

skill2: Recovers Cover's HP by 7.52%.
